Actions.Text: REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Votes.VoteType: Favorable refer to committee Ways and Means

Title: Extends the tax credits under the economic transformation and facility redevelopment program
Summary: Extends the tax credits under the economic transformation and facility redevelopment program until 2031.
LawCode: Amd Part V §12, Chap 61 of 2011; amd §400, Ec Dev L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 61 of the laws of 2011 amending the economic development law, the tax law and the real property tax law relating to establishing the economic transformation and facility redevelopment program and providing tax benefits under that program; and to amend the economic development law, in relation to extending the tax credits under the economic transformation and facility redevelopment program
